// ─── NEDERLANDS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const T_NL = {
  motto: "Horen om te weten waar je bent,\nkijken om te zien waarheen je gaat.",
  sim: "SIMULATIE",
  gpsLive: "GPS LIVE",
  addPoi: "+ POI",
  import: "Import",
  export: "Export",
  clear: "Wis",
  confirm: "Bevestig",
  cancel: "Annuleer",
  search: "Naam of Pluscode\u2026",
  noPois: "Geen POI's gevonden",
  settings: "Instellingen",
  userId: "Gebruikers-ID",
  languages: "Talen",
  eleven: "ElevenLabs Config",
  editPoi: "POI Bewerken",
  name: "Naam",
  desc: "Beschrijving",
  cat: "Categorie",
  radius: "Straal (m)",
  save: "Opslaan",
  clearDb: "Database wissen?",
  routeMenu: "Route & Track",
  loadGpx: "GPX Laden",
  startRec: "Start Opname",
  stopRec: "Stop Opname",
  saveTrack: "Opslaan",
  clearTrack: "Wis Track",
  trackOn: "OPNEMEN",
  trackPause: "GEPAUZEERD",
  trackOff: "GESTOPT",
  pluscode: "Pluscode",
  osm: "OSM",
  sat: "SAT",
  copyLogs: "Logs kopi\u00EBren",
  clearLogs: "Logs wissen",
  target: "PRIKPUNT",
  photo: "Foto",
  audio: "Audio",
  browseAudio: "Lokaal bestand",
  sysInfo: "Systeem Logs",
  meter: "meter",
  transport_label: "Vervoersmiddel",
  announce: (n, d, c) => `${n}. Op ${Math.round(d)} meter. Op ${c} uur.`,
  aboutTitle: "Over EuroPoi",
  aboutText: "Ontwerp: Peter Drukker\n\u00A9 2026\nduyfje@icloud.com",
  stopSpeech: "STOP SPRAAK",
  pin: "Pincode Invoeren",
  adminOn: "ADMIN MODUS ACTIEF",
  adminOff: "TOEGANG GEWEIGERD",
  offline: "OFFLINE",
  pinHint: "4-cijferige code",
  audioHierarchy: "Spraakhi\u00EBrarchie",
  audioSrc1: "1 \u00B7 CSV/URL (online)",
  audioSrc2: "2 \u00B7 Bulk (pluscode)",
  audioSrc3: "3 \u00B7 Individueel bestand",
  audioSrc4: "4 \u00B7 ElevenLabs TTS",
  audioSrc5: "5 \u00B7 Browser stem",
  bulkTitle: "Bulk Audio (MP3/WAV)",
  bulkHint: "Bestandsnaam = Pluscode (bijv. 9F4M3Q22+XX.mp3)",
  bulkBtn: "Bestanden Selecteren",
  bulkResult: (n) => `${n} bestand(en) gekoppeld`,
  bulkOverwrite: "Bestaande koppelingen worden overschreven",
};

// ─── ENGLISH ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const T_EN = {
  ...T_NL,
  motto: "Hear to know where you are,\nlook to see where you're going.",

  gpsLive: "GPS LIVE",
  addPoi: "+ POI",
  import: "Import",
  export: "Export",
  clear: "Clear",

  aboutTitle: "About EuroPoi",
  aboutText: "Design: Peter Drukker\n\u00A9 2026\nduyfje@icloud.com",

  pin: "Enter PIN",
  adminOn: "ADMIN MODE ACTIVE",
  adminOff: "ACCESS DENIED",
  offline: "OFFLINE",
  pinHint: "4-digit code",
  audioHierarchy: "Audio Hierarchy",

  audioSrc2: "2 \u00B7 Bulk (pluscode)",

};

// ─── DEUTSCH ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const T_DE = {
  ...T_EN,
  motto:
    "H\u00F6ren um zu wissen wo du bist,\nschauen um zu sehen wohin du gehst.",

// ─── FRANÇAIS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const T_FR = {
  ...T_EN,

// ─── ESPAÑOL ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const T_ES = {
  ...T_EN,
  motto:

  export: "Exportar",

  confirm: "Confirmar",

const T_IT = {

// ─── LOOKUP ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const TRANSLATIONS = {
  "nl-NL": T_NL,
  "en-GB": T_EN,
  "de-DE": T_DE,
  "fr-FR": T_FR,
  "es-ES": T_ES,
  "it-IT": T_IT,
};

export const getT = (lang) => TRANSLATIONS[lang] || T_NL;
